meaning: adj.无名的,不知名的,匿名的,不可名状的,难以形容的
examples: You may end up buying their book on the way out, but soon afterwards, it is much like fast food, and you get a nameless sense that you've been cheated.
Were it not for the nameless adventure that awaited them, they would have thrown a pair of dice each evening and agreed that two sixes would end it all.
This nameless person pushed the human race over a historic threshold, for it was in that year that mankind became, for the first time in its history, a predominantly urban species.
Nameless waterfalls tumble down from the plateau above, while the shadows of clouds dance across treeless slopes.
Yes, that's one of those big nameless guys who plays on the offensive line.
